title: AI Search Optimization Intro
description: How to optimize for AI search engines like Perplexity and ChatGPT.
content:
AI search = ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Grok, Meta AI. Optimize for mentions, not just clicks.

AI vs Google?

Google returns 10+ pages, user clicks 1-3 links. AI synthesizes single answer, names 2-5 brands.

CTR collapse?

Position-1 CTR collapsed from 25-30% to 2.6% when AI Overviews trigger.

title: AI Search Trends 2026
description: Latest AI search statistics and trends for 2026.
content:
Gartner predicts 25% traditional search decline by 2026. AI chatbot referral traffic: 1.1 billion visits, 357% year-over-year growth.

User behavior?

35% of US consumers use AI at product discovery vs 13.6% who use traditional search.
